holdings.infoBox: PEXL is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 7.03%, Alphabet at 4.96%, Apple at 4.80%, Broadcom at 4.69%, and Microsoft at 3.99%.

overview.description: The Pacer US Export Leaders ETF (PEXL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer US Export Leaders ETF index. The fund tracks an equally-weighted index of large- and mid-cap US stocks selected based on foreign sales and free cash flow growth. PEXL was launched on Jul 23, 2018 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer US Export Leaders ETF Index
